app.name: Job Hunter
footer.tagline: AI-powered job search assistant for the Australian market.
home.subtitle: AI-powered job search assistant. Find your dream job today!
home.actions.jobs.title: Browse Jobs
home.actions.jobs.desc: View all available jobs from APS, Seek, and LinkedIn
home.actions.resumes.title: Manage Resumes
home.actions.match.title: AI Matching
home.actions.match.desc: Get AI-powered job matches based on your resume
home.actions.scraper.title: Run Scraper
home.actions.scraper.desc: Scrape jobs from APS, Seek, and LinkedIn
jobs.list.title: Job List
jobs.list.subtitle: We automatically score each job against your resume and surface the best-fit roles first.
jobs.list.empty: No jobs available yet. Upload job data and run an analysis from the admin panel.
jobs.detail.overview.title: Job Description
jobs.detail.fit.title: Fit Analysis
jobs.detail.fit.notCalculated: Fit score has not been calculated yet. Run the analysis from the admin panel.
jobs.detail.gaps.title: Gap Analysis
jobs.detail.gaps.none: No obvious skills gaps detected. You appear to be a strong match for this role.
jobs.detail.gaps.description: These are keywords from the job description that are weak or missing from your resume:
jobs.detail.coverLetter.title: Cover Letter
jobs.detail.coverLetter.empty: Cover letter has not been generated yet. Run the analysis from the admin panel.
jobs.detail.company.title: Company Research
admin.scraper.title: Scraper Control
admin.scraper.description: Trigger the Seek, LinkedIn, or APSJobs scraper to fetch the latest roles into the database. Runs in the background and will not block the admin UI.
admin.scraper.error.network: Failed to trigger scraper: network error or server unavailable.
admin.dashboard.title: Admin Panel
admin.dashboard.subtitle: Run analyses, upload job data, and inspect overall matching statistics.
admin.analysis.title: Run Status
admin.analysis.none: No analysis has been run yet.
admin.analysis.status.startedWithId: Analysis started. Run ID: {runId}. Please refresh later to see results.
admin.analysis.status.started: Analysis started. Please refresh later to see results.
admin.analysis.error.network: Failed to trigger analysis: network error or server unavailable.
admin.stats.title: Data Overview
admin.upload.title: Upload Job Data
admin.upload.description: Accepts JSON containing an array of job objects with fields like title, company_name, description, role, url, location, and salary.
admin.upload.file.title: Upload Job JSON From File
admin.upload.file.description: Choose a local JSON file. The contents should match the format above (either an array of jobs or an object with a jobs array).
resumes.list.title: My Resumes
resumes.list.subtitle: Upload multiple resumes and choose a primary one for matching and cover letter generation.
resumes.list.uploadHint: You can upload .docx resume files (recommended). Other text files will be parsed as plain text.
resumes.list.empty: No resumes yet. Upload a .docx resume or start with a sample resume.
resumes.list.table.name: Name
resumes.list.table.noFile: No file (seed data or legacy entry)
resumes.list.table.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this resume? This action cannot be undone.
resumes.detail.summary.title: Professional Summary
resumes.detail.experience.title: Experience
resumes.detail.education.title: Education
resumes.detail.skills.title: Skills
resumes.detail.actions.title: Actions
resumes.detail.actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this resume?
resumes.upload.title: Upload Resume
resumes.upload.subtitle: Upload a .docx resume file. The system will extract key information for matching and cover letter generation.
resumes.upload.hint: Maximum file size 5MB. After upload, you can set the primary resume on the "My Resumes" page.
